_comment: Template for an authoring-tool client (public, Authorization Code + PKCE). Used by scripts/add-tool-client.sh when each tool repo is created. Replace TOOL_SLUG and TOOL_HOST. Every client must keep `uniche-platform-audience` as a default client scope so its tokens carry aud:uniche-platform. Do NOT add role/membership/admin protocol mappers — authorization lives in the Catalogue.
